executive_summary: The system allows users to create an account by providing first name, last name, email, phone, password, and confirm password. After registration, a unique verification link is sent via email, which must be clicked before the first login. The link expires after 24 hours, and users can request a resend every 60 seconds. Password rules include length between 8 and 12 characters, at least one uppercase, one lowercase, one digit, and one special character (e.g., @, #, $, %, ^, &, *), no consecutive spaces, and no inclusion of the email prefix or username. Email must be unique and contain '@' and a domain. Meaningful inline error messages are required for duplicate email, invalid password length, and invalid email format.
functional_summary: Users can create an account (FR001) by providing first name, last name, email, phone, password, and confirm password (FR005). After registration, the system sends a unique verification link via email (FR003). Users must verify their email before first login (FR002). Users can request a resend of the verification link every 60 seconds (FR004). The verification link is valid for 24 hours (BR006).
confirmed_business_rules: Password minimum length is 8 characters, maximum length is 12 characters (BR002).
Password must contain at least one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, one numeric digit, and one special character (e.g., @, #, $, %, ^, &, *) (BR003).
Consecutive spaces in the password are forbidden (BR004).
Password cannot contain the user's explicit email prefix or username (BR005).
Verification link is valid for 24 hours (BR006).
validation_rules: Email format must contain '@' and a domain (VAL001).
Password length must be between 8 and 12 characters (VAL002).
Password must contain at least one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, one numeric digit, and one special character (VAL003).
Password must not contain consecutive spaces (VAL004).
Password must not contain the user's explicit email prefix or username (VAL005).
Email must be unique (duplicate email check) (VAL006).
Meaningful inline error messages must be displayed for duplicate email, invalid password length, or invalid email format (VAL008).
open_questions: What is the exact list of allowed special characters for password? (Only examples given: @, #, $, %, ^, &, *)
What are the phone number validation rules (format, length, uniqueness)?
What are the first name and last name validation rules (e.g., required, max length, allowed characters)?
What error messages should be displayed for validation failures other than duplicate email, invalid password length, or invalid email format (e.g., password complexity, confirm password mismatch)?
assumptions: The email verification system (sending verification link) is available as a dependency (DEP001).
Token expiration and resend logic (24-hour validity, 60-second resend cooldown) will be implemented as a dependency (DEP002).
risks: Email delivery failures may prevent users from verifying their accounts (RISK001).
Users may abuse the resend feature if rate limiting is not properly enforced (RISK002).
